title: Stone Is Stone
description: Makes more stone variants (stone, granite, diorite, end stone...) usable in vanilla recipes (stone tools, furnace, dispenser...). Configurable.
body:
# Stone Is Stone This Fabric mod makes more stone variants usable in vanilla recipes. As simple as that.
**Configurable with a json file.** ![All Stone Pickaxe recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cceb453876d9b520836aae6c30e1d9baf30eb9d.gif) ### Added Stone Variants (by default) - Stone - Deepslate - Andesite - Diorite - Granite - End Stone - Mossy Cobblestone ### Affected Recipes - Stone Tools - Brewing Stand - Dispenser - Dropper - Furnace - Lever - Observer - Piston ### Supported Versions - 1.19.3 - 1.19.4 - 1.20.x - 1.21.x
